name: PH - Teach You a Lesson (2026) (KR)
plot: When respect collapses in schools, unconventional inspectors arrive to set things right — with sharp, no-nonsense lessons you won't find in textbooks.
cast: Kim Moo-yul, Lee Sung-min, Jin Ki-joo, Pyo Ji-hoon
director: Hong Jong-chan, Lee Nam-kyu, Kim Da-hee

name: PH - Love Your Enemy (2024) (KR)
plot: Born on the same day and with the same name, Seok Ji-won and Yoon Ji-won have been enemies for generations, and reunite after 18 years.
cast: Ju Ji-hoon, Jung Yu-mi, Lee Si-woo, Kim Ye-won, Kim Kap-soo, Lee Byung-joon, Kim Jung-young, Jeon Hye-jin

name: PH - The WONDERfools (2026) (KR)
plot: A goofy group of townies stumbles into superpowers and fights rising evil as doomsday panic grows in this wild, turn-of-the-century action comedy.
cast: Park Eun-bin, Cha Eun-woo, Choi Dae-hoon, Im Sung-jae, Son Hyun-joo, Kim Hae-sook, Bae Na-ra, Jung Yi-seo
director: Kang Eun-kyung, Yoo In-sik, Huh Dah-joong
genre: Action & Adventure / Comedy / Sci-Fi & Fantasy / Drama

name: PH - Love Scout (2025) (KR)
plot: Yoo Eun-ho, a single dad armed with perfection, becomes the secretary of Kang Ji-yun, the CEO of a popular headhunter company, who doesn't do anything except work.
cast: Han Ji-min, Lee Jun-hyuk, Kim Do-hoon, Kim Yoon-hye, Park Bo-kyung, Gi So-you, Lee Sang-hee, Heo Dong-won

name: PH - The Forbidden Flower (2023)
plot: A winter-summer romance between an 20-year-old girl, He Ran, and a middle-aged man, Xiao Han. They both took a chance on each other; love and passion followed. Where would their story go in a sea of paint and flowers?
cast: Jerry Yan, Xu Ruo Han, Crystal Huang, Kido Ma, Yu Xiang, Tang Zeng, Zhao Yuan Yuan, and Tian Kai

name: PH - If Wishes Could Kill (2026) (KR)
plot: A mysterious app promises wishes — then starts a countdown to death. As a group of teens becomes entangled, they must break the deadly chain to survive.
cast: Jeon So-young, Baek Sun-ho, Kang Mi-na, Hyun Woo-seok, Lee Hyo-je, Roh Jae-won, Jeon So-nee, Yoon Sa-bong

name: PH - Straight to Hell (2026) (JP)
plot: As Japan's most famous fortune teller, Kazuko Hosoki ruled TV and bestseller lists, but who was she behind rumors of spiritual scams and underworld ties?
cast: Erika Toda, Sairi Ito, Toko Miura, Toma Ikuta, Eita Okuno, Kentaro Tamura, Ayumu Nakajima, Gaku Hosokawa

name: PH - Last Samurai Standing (2025) (JP)
plot: In the early Meiji era, Shujiro, once known as an undefeated samurai, decides to participate in a deadly survival game to save his family and villagers.
cast: Junichi Okada, Yumia Fujisaki, Kaya Kiyohara, Masahiro Higashide, Shota Sometani, Taichi Saotome, Yuya Endo, Yasushi Fuchikami

name: PH - Bloodhounds (2023) (KR)
plot: Two young boxers band together with a benevolent moneylender to take down a ruthless loan shark who preys on the financially desperate.
cast: Woo Do-hwan, Lee Sang-yi, Rain, Hwang Chan-sung, Choi Si-won, Son Suk-ku
